title: christolea borealis
intro: Christolea borealis, also known as Tanseko or Bristle-burr, is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. Research has shown that Christolea borealis may have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially exerting anti-cancer effects. Christolea borealis is typically prepared as a tea or capsule using dried roots and leaves of the plant.
